name: Mrs. Field's Sweetie Pies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper.
Melt the unsweetened chocolate and first batch of chocolate chips in a double boiler, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour into a large bowl.
Add butter and beat at medium speed until combined. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla; beat until well blended.
Scrape the sides of the bowl. Gradually add flour and all three types of chocolate chips; mix just until combined.
Roll dough into balls about 1 1/2 inches in diameter, spacing them 2 inches apart on paper-lined pans. Flatten each ball to 1/2-inch thickness with the palm of your hand.
Bake for 10-12 minutes. Transfer with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
